behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all relevant files (types.ts, UsageExportHeader.tsx, EntityUsage.tsx, UsageViewSelect.tsx, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md), the 'user' entity type, 'User Usage' label, userDailyActivityCall endpoint, and the documentation concepts tested.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what should work (add user option, support single/multi modes) without specifying prop names like 'filterMode' or exact implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_export_header_supports_single_select_mode asserts on specific prop name 'filterMode' with literal values 'multiple'/'single' and specific patterns like 'selectedFilters[0]' — an alternative correct implementation using e.g. 'mode' prop or different value extraction would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use TypeScript compilation via tsc, run Vitest suites via npm, and parse/evaluate code, not just grep file contents.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual type union changes, runtime option values, conditional mode handling, and passing Vitest suites — a stub cannot satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover EntityType union, UsageViewSelect option, single-select support, EntityUsage user handling, and AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md documentation updates as required.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under '# --- Code behavior tests ---', '# --- Config/documentation update tests ---', '# --- Pass-to-pass tests ---' comment sections with descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is UI/documentation changes, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and names match between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies component files to look at without specifying exact lines or the exact buggy statements.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch to AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md adds small localized sections (2 new items, one new section) rather than rewriting the files.
